odoo.template:
Memo AI Editor Memo AI Editor Connecting to Odoo... Searching for analysis... Save to Odoo var currentSid = ''; /* */ // Use the most compatible way to start Office.initialize = function (reason) { updateStatus("Office Bridge Ready"); startApp(); }; // Fallback for some systems window.onload = function() { setTimeout(function() { if (document.getElementById('status-label').textContent === "Connecting to Odoo...") { updateStatus("Starting via Fallback..."); startApp(); } }, 2000); }; function updateStatus(msg) { document.getElementById('status-label').textContent = msg; } function startApp() { if (currentSid && currentSid !== "None" && currentSid !== "") { loadMemo(currentSid); } else { loadRecent(); } } function apiCall(url, params, callback) { updateStatus("Requesting Odoo..."); var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("POST", url, true); xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json"); xhr.onreadystatechange = function () { if (xhr.readyState === 4) { if (xhr.status === 200) { try { var resp = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText); callback(resp.result); } catch (e) { updateStatus("Error reading server."); } } else { updateStatus("Server not reachable (Status " + xhr.status + ")"); } } }; xhr.send(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", params: params })); } function loadRecent() { apiCall('/word_addin/get_recent_sessions', {}, function(res) { if (res && res.error === 'authentication_required') { renderLogin(); } else if (res && res.length > 0) { renderMemos(res); } else { document.getElementById('main-msg').textContent = "No recent memos found."; } }); } function renderLogin() { updateStatus("Login Required"); var content = document.getElementById('content'); content.innerHTML = '
' + '
Please log in to Odoo
' + '' + '

Then close/open this panel.

' + '
'; } function renderMemos(list) { updateStatus("Select a Memo"); var content = document.getElementById('content'); content.innerHTML = '
Recent Analysis:
'; list.forEach(function(m) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'card-memo'; div.onclick = function() { loadMemo(m.id); }; div.innerHTML = '' + m.name + '
' + m.subject + ''; content.appendChild(div); }); } function loadMemo(sid) { currentSid = sid; updateStatus("Loading Memo..."); apiCall('/word_addin/get_memo_data', { session_id: sid }, function(res) { if (res && !res.error) { renderSteps(res); } else { loadRecent(); } }); } function renderSteps(data) { updateStatus("Editing: " + data.name); var content = document.getElementById('content'); content.innerHTML = '
Insert Steps into Word:
'; data.steps.forEach(function(s) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'card-memo'; div.onclick = function() { Word.run(function(ctx) { ctx.document.body.insertHtml(s.content, "End"); return ctx.sync(); }); }; div.innerHTML = '' + s.title + '
Click to insert into Word'; content.appendChild(div); }); document.getElementById('footer').style.display = 'block'; } document.getElementById('btn-save-final').onclick = function() { updateStatus("Saving to Odoo..."); Word.run(function(ctx) { var html = ctx.document.body.getHtml(); return ctx.sync().then(function() { apiCall('/word_addin/save_memo_data', { session_id: currentSid, steps_data: [{id: 1, content: html.value}] }, function(res) { if (res && res.success) alert("Saved successfully!"); else alert("Save failed."); updateStatus("Ready"); }); }); }); }; /* */
